owning_subsystem: workspace dependency governance, runtime/tooling modernization, and UI/runtime compatibility
non_goals: Do not change architectural dependency direction.
Do not introduce direct SurrealDB usage outside shared/surrealdb-access.
Do not move schema ownership out of schemas/.
Do not fork browser and desktop UI contracts.
scope_in: Create issue-linked execution artifacts for the program and each implementation phase.
Pin repository Rust-installing workflows to the workspace toolchain and remove the UI hardening blocker.
Centralize governed dependencies in the root workspace manifest.
Upgrade non-UI and UI dependencies in bounded phases.
Uplift the workspace to Edition 2024 after dependency phases are green.
scope_out: Product feature work unrelated to dependency and language modernization.
Intentional breaking contract or event redesign.
Infrastructure redesign outside the deterministic toolchain and validation path.
acceptance_criteria: The modernization work is decomposed into bounded phase issues with matching execution artifacts.
cargo verify-repo remains green after the non-UI modernization phases.
cargo xtask verify profile ui and cargo xtask ui-hardening pass after the UI modernization phase.
The workspace builds and passes clippy on Edition 2024 without architectural boundary regressions.
validation_artifacts: Passing repository verification and UI hardening output
Committed phase issue references and plan bundles
Reviewed Cargo manifest and lockfile changes
rollback_path: Revert each phase as a bounded unit so the repository returns to the pre-modernization dependency, toolchain, and edition baseline without mixed framework states.
